title: Decaisnea insignis
taxonomy: Decaisnea insignis is a member of the family Papaveraceae. This classification is due to its shared characteristics with other plants in the same family. Decaisnea insignis is native to the Himalayas and is often classified as a perennial shrub. It belongs to the genus Decaisnea and is a unique species within the Papaveraceae family. The classification of Decaisnea insignis is further supported by its distinctive blue berries and yellow flowers.
